full_text:
Gongsun Yang 公孫陽
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gongsun Yang (公孫陽)was born in Jincheng. Wu general who was captured during Wei’s invasion via Ruxukou. Gongsun Yang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
